content: Neon PostgreSQL: Free tier (Oct 2025+) includes 100 CU-hours/month + 0.5GB storage. Serverless Postgres with scale-to-zero. HTTP-based connections work in edge runtimes (Cloudflare Workers). Acquired by Databricks May 2025, pricing reduced 15-25%. No monthly minimum as of Dec 2025. Edge-compatible via @neondatabase/serverless driver for Drizzle. Perfect for OSS side projects.
